description.value:
Through an extensive process of body modification, you've adjusted your body shape to produce extra space for augmentations. This extra space never goes unused, and you're always tinkering around to try out new augmentations depending on your mood and the challenges ahead.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Augmented Body] general feat. When you swap the augmentation as though changing out a feat during downtime, you only need to spend 3 days to make the swap.
